title: schoenus spicatus
intro: Schoenus spicatus, also known as sea rush or sea blite, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Schoenus spicatus include relief from symptoms of eczema, acne, and other skin conditions, as well as aiding in the treatment of indigestion and diarrhea. Herbal preparations of Schoenus spicatus can be made by infusing the plant in hot water or oil, and can also be used in the form of tinctures or salves for topical application.
